02

Set your intention

Name the one thing you're focusing on. It'll show on the hero.

03

Breathe before you begin

A 60-second 4-7-8 reset calms your nervous system and primes deep focus.

Ready
4-7-8 method · 0 cycles
04

Layer in some ambiance

Background sound masks distractions and deepens focus. Tap to play, tap again to stop — sounds layer together.

05

Pomodoro cycles

The classic 25 / 5 rhythm. Complete 4 focus blocks, then take a longer 15–30 min break.

Cycle 1 / 4
Today 0
Phase Focus
After 4 cycles, take a 15–30 min long break to consolidate learning.
06

Brain dump

Caught a distracting thought? Capture it here — deal with it later, stay in the flow now.

Nothing dumped yet — your mind is clear.
07

Distraction tally

Each time you catch your mind wandering, tap the button. Awareness is the first step back to focus.

Best streak —
7-day total 0
08

Eisenhower matrix

Sort tasks by urgency × importance. Quadrant II (important, not urgent) is where deep work lives.

Do first Urgent · Important
Schedule Important · Not urgent
Delegate Urgent · Not important
Eliminate Not urgent · Not important
Tip: aim to spend most of your focus time in Q2 — Schedule. That's where meaningful, deep work happens.
09

Daily focus goal

Set a target in minutes for today. Each completed focus session brings you closer.

10

Energy tracker

Log your energy through the day. After a week, you'll see your natural peak focus hours.

11

Focus reflection

Take 30 seconds after a session. What worked? What pulled you away? Patterns emerge within a week.

Tap a star to rate your last session

Preferences
Settings
Customize Motion to match your workflow and study style.
General
Used for timeline and block scheduling calculations
How time is displayed across the app
Pre-filled duration when adding a new time block (minutes)
First day shown in the calendar grid
Focus & Notifications
Block end notifications
Show a browser notification when a time block ends
Focus mode auto-sound
Auto-play Brown Noise when Focus Timer starts
Remind you to take a break every N completed focus sessions
Welcome greeting toast
Show the "Good morning / Good afternoon" toast on load
Appearance
Choose your preferred color scheme
Typeface used by the giant timer on the Focus page — preview live as you pick
Sidebar visible by default
Keep sidebar expanded when the app loads
Compact mode
Reduce padding on block cards for more items visible at once
Phone mode
Mobile-optimized layout with bottom navigation, larger touch targets, and no sidebar — ideal for phones. Auto-detects on load; toggle to override.
Auto-detect device
Clears any manual override and detects phone/PC mode automatically based on screen size + touch support
Animations
Disable all motion effects for a distraction-free experience
Keyboard Shortcuts
Shortcuts work anywhere — unless you're typing in an input field. Press ? anytime to show this list.
Add new time block N
Go to Time Blocks 1
Go to Tasks 2
Go to Focus Timer 3
Go to Tracker 4
Go to Notes 5
Go to Calendar 6
Go to Sound Studio 7
Go to Settings 8
Previous day ←
Next day →
Jump to today T
Toggle sidebar I
Toggle sidebar (keep topbar) S
Toggle topbar / chrome O
Toggle sidebar + topbar + tabs X
Open Backup modal B
Show keyboard shortcuts ?
Start / pause focus timer Space
Reset focus timer R
Close any modal / overlay Esc
Data & Storage
Export backup
Download all your data as a JSON file
Restore from backup
Load a previously exported JSON file
Auto-clear old blocks
Automatically remove blocks older than 90 days to save storage
Clear all data
Delete all blocks, tasks, habits, and notes — moved to Trash (recoverable for 30 days)
Cloud Sync
Cloud Sync
Sign in with Google to sync your data across phone, PC, and laptop via Firebase
Auto-sync
Automatically sync your data to the cloud every minute
Synced just now
Your data is synced with Google Drive
Pull from cloud
Download the latest data from the cloud (overwrites local)
Google account
Signed in
Data recovery
Restore from an automatic pre-sync backup
Trash 0
Deleted items are kept for 30 days
AI Assistant
Default AI Model
The model used when starting new conversations
Streaming responses
Show AI responses word-by-word as they generate
Action confirmations
Require explicit confirmation before AI modifies your data
AI memory
Allow the assistant to remember preferences and work patterns
Chat retention
How long to keep conversation history
Productivity insights
Allow AI to analyze your patterns and suggest improvements
Data access
The AI works as a normal AI — no access to your Motion data
API Keys
Add multiple API keys per provider. Only one key per provider is active at a time — switch manually in the list below.
Clear AI conversations
Delete all AI chat history and messages
Clear AI memory
Delete all stored AI memories and preferences

About
Motion
v17.0 — Premium Edition
Your personal productivity OS. Built for deep work, flow states, and consistent progress.
Add API Key
The API endpoint URL (OpenAI-compatible). Must end with /v1 or similar.
The model ID to use in API requests. Leave blank to use a default.
OpenAI offers free API credits for new accounts. Get your key at platform.openai.com

Focus Music

💾 Backup & Restore
Export all your data as a JSON file, or restore from a previous backup. Your data is safe — stored locally in your browser.
📤
Export Backup
Download all your blocks, tasks, habits, rules and thoughts as a JSON file.
📥
Restore Backup
Load a previously exported JSON backup file to restore your data.
🗂 Drop a backup file here or click to browse
